name: EGB OE TL.Z./FRAPORT
summary: Fraport AG is a German transport company that operates the Frankfurt Airport, the largest airport in Germany and one of the busiest in Europe. The company offers a range of airport services, including terminal management, retail and real estate activities, and ground handling. Headquartered in Frankfurt, Fraport's business model is based on operating and managing airport infrastructure and related services, generating revenue through airport charges, retail sales, and real estate leasing.
